purpose: Sends the PAULST screen to the user, optionally erasing the screen first, and populates header information and error messages.
Gathers detailed authorization data for a given account ID if provided, initializing related data structures and processing forward page logic if a segment is found.
Sends the PAULST screen to the user, optionally erasing the screen first, and populates header information and error messages.
Receives input from the PAULST screen into the input map COPAU0AI without modifying any working-storage variables directly.
Processes the ENTER key press by validating account input, setting selection flags, and potentially XCTLing to another program based on user selection.
Sends the PAULST screen to the user, optionally erasing the previous screen, and populates header information and error messages.
Sets up the COMMAREA to return to the previous program by populating return program, transaction, and context information before issuing an XCTL.
Sends the PAULST screen to the user, optionally erasing the previous screen, and populates header information and error messages.
Processes the PF7 (page up) key by navigating to the previous page of authorization data if available, updating working storage variables accordingly.
Sends the PAULST screen to the user, optionally erasing the previous screen, and populates header information and error messages.
Processes PF8 key press to reposition authorizations or display a message if already at the bottom of the page.
Sends the authorization listing screen to the user, either with an erase or cursor option based on the SEND-ERASE-YES flag.
Sends the authorization listing screen to the user, either with an erase or cursor option based on the SEND-ERASE-YES flag.
Gathers account and authorization details for the entered account ID, initializing data and processing the forward page if applicable.
Retrieves and populates account, customer, and card cross-reference data along with authorization summary metrics for display.
Initializes authorization data by clearing screen input fields and setting default values for authorization entries 1 through 5.
Processes forward paging logic to retrieve and display the next set of authorization records based on user navigation.
Retrieves the authorization summary segment for a given account ID using IMS DL/I and sets status flags based on the result.
Resets all authorization entry fields on the screen to spaces and sets default bitmap protection for entries 1 through 5.
Processes forward paging logic to retrieve and display the next set of authorization records after navigating back a page.
Retrieves the authorization summary segment from the IMS database using the account ID as a key.
Repositions the IMS database cursor to the authorization detail segment corresponding to the saved authorization key.
Initializes the authorization data screen fields by setting selection indicators and clearing transaction details for all five authorization entries.
Processes forward paging through authorization records by retrieving and populating up to five authorization details starting from the current position.
Repositions the IMS database cursor to the authorization detail segment corresponding to the saved authorization key when navigating pages.
Retrieves the next authorization record from the IMS database and sets EOF or error flags based on the result.
Populates the screen fields for a specific authorization entry based on the current index and data from the PA segment.
Retrieves the next authorization record from the IMS database and sets EOF or error flags based on the result.
Sends the authorization list screen to the user, optionally erasing the screen, after an error occurs during authorization retrieval.
Sends the authorization list screen to the user, optionally erasing the screen, after an error occurs during repositioning of the authorization record.
Populates the screen header with current date, time, transaction ID, and program name for display.
Retrieves customer and card number from the card cross-reference file using the account ID as key.
Reads account data from the ACCTDAT file using the account ID from the cross-reference.
Retrieves customer data from the CUSTDAT file using the customer ID obtained from the card cross-reference.
Retrieves the authorization summary segment for the account from IMS using the account ID.
Sends an error screen with a message when the account is not found or a system error occurs during card XREF lookup by account.
Sends an error screen with a message when the account is not found or a system error occurs during card XREF lookup by account.
Sends an error screen with a message when the account is not found or a system error occurs during account data lookup by account ID.
Sends an error screen with a message when the account is not found or a system error occurs during account data lookup by account ID.
Sends an error screen with a message when the customer is not found or a system error occurs during customer data lookup by customer ID.
Sends an error screen with a message when a customer is not found or a system error occurs during customer data retrieval.
Schedules the PSB for IMS processing before attempting to retrieve the authorization summary segment.
Displays an error screen when a system error occurs while reading the authorization summary segment.
Sends an error screen if the PSB scheduling fails with a system error.
